description: The Soriano are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Filandari, Vibo Valentia, Italy. They are primarily involved in drug trafficking and extortion in the municipalities of Filandari and Jonadi. They have strong ties with the Mancuso 'ndrina. The group was heavily impacted by the Genesi trial (2000) and the Rotarico operation (2007).
